# indway

> Membangun sistem cerdas dan solusi digital berdampak tinggi. Fokus pada integrasi AI, automasi, dan arsitektur produk yang skalabel.

- Role: AI-driven Solution Architect
- Experience: 7+ years building digital products
- Availability: Open to Remote / Freelance
- Stack: Node.js, Python, React, Docker, PyTorch, Git
- Services: AI Integration, System Architecture, Full-stack Dev, Automation
- Link: https://indway.github.io

## Rates

- Rp750.000/jam (perkiraan, tergantung proyek)

## Contact & Socials

- email: mailto:indway@duck.com
- diary: /diary/
- follow @indthatway: https://instagram.com/indthatway
- desktop: https://kodekeras.my.id

## Products (Lab)

- 🟢 **ViGen**: Video Generator dengan AI [AI, Video, Generator]
- 🟢 **GenSu**: Si Pembuat Surat [AI, Document, Automation]
- 🟡 **Content Intelligence**: Pembuat Konten Berdasarkan Insight [AI, Content, Analytics]
- 🟢 **Indexer**: Otomatis Indexing Website [SEO, Automation, Indexing]
- 🟢 **1826d**: Catatan Perjalanan Hidup [Journal, Encrypted, Offline]
- [lihatmami](https://instagram.com/kodekeras.jpg): Steganografi · seni @kodekeras.jpg [Art, Steganography, Creative]
- 🟢 **jadicms**: Git Based Content Hub & Media Management [CMS, Git, No-DB]
